lore.english:
Demon. Low-rank Succubus of the demon realm. When hungry, she appears in people's dreams and sucks the vitality out of them. She's a typical demon driven by desire, as seen when she needs money; she uses all sorts of trickery to make money the easiest way possible. Lives doing whatever she wants every day and doesn't look back on the past.

People tend to avoid her because she doesn't think before she acts, but this sometimes helps her to make friends regardless of race or faction. She's a notorious duo with Minasaki, as they often scheme together.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Tail Whip[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy using the tail like a whip.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:720102]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:720102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:720102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Happy Dream[-]
skills.description:
Uses seductive gestures to deceive the enemy and then attack.
Target hit is [&Provocation]ed at a [&Color_Cyan][R:720202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:720202] turn(s)
When hit by the taunted target, restores [&HP] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:720203]%[-] of their Max. [&HP].
